properties.title: Az izraeli hadsereg kiürítési parancsot adott ki a libanoni Türoszra, beleértve a keresztény negyedet is
properties.summary: A mostani kiürítési parancs azért is különösen érzékeny, mert Türosz keresztény negyede korábban viszonylag védettnek számított az izraeli hadműveletek során.

properties.title: Hihetetlen mértékben csökken Putyin befolyása a világban, közben Trump intézi az USA önfelszámolását – nemzetközi lapszemle
properties.summary: Putyin legutóbb Örményországban szaladt bele nagy pofonba. Trump minden elődjénél jobban elszámolta magát a Közel-Keleten. Az USA-nak csínján kell bánnia Kubával, mert a kommunista rendszer összeomlása politikai instabilitással és gazdasági káosszal járhat. Témák és vélemények a világsajtóból.

properties.title: Ingyen adta a földjét a városnak, hogy közpark épüljön rajta, 9 milliárdért adták el egy adatközpontot építő cégnek
properties.summary: Komoly felháborodást váltott ki a texasi Taylor városában, hogy a város eladta a korábban ingyen megkapott földterületet, hogy adatközpont épülhessen rajta a közpark helyett.

properties.title: Rettegett amerikai feketelistára kerültek fel a kínai óriáscégek
properties.summary: Az Egyesült Államok Védelmi Minisztériuma frissítette a kínai katonai vállalatokról vezetett listáját, amelyre többek között az Alibaba, a Baidu, a BYD és a NIO is felkerült. A lépés alig néhány héttel azután történt, hogy Donald Trump Pekingben találkozott Hszi Csin-ping kínai elnökkel, és a felek fenntartották a kereskedelmi háborúban kialakított törékeny tűzszünetet.

properties.title: Olyan verseny alakult ki a világpiacon a hormuzi fennakadás nyomán, amelyben a nyugati országok csúfosan lemaradtak
properties.summary: A Hormuzi-szoros több mint három hónapja tartó de facto lezárása az üzemanyagárak, különösen a gázolajár globális emelkedését vonta maga után, ami a közúti áruszállítás jövőjére is komoly hatással lehet. A Coface legfrissebb elemzése szerint a drágulás és a szigorodó környezetvédelmi előírások együttesen ugyan felgyorsíthatják a teherfuvarozás zöld átállását, ezt a folyamatot azonban számos működési és gyártási akadály lassíthatja, ráadásul a kontinensek között is óriásiak a különbségek.

properties.title: Már a Kreml is elismeri: tarolnak az ukrán drónok, fordulhat a kocka - Híreink az orosz-ukrán háborúból kedden
properties.summary: Már Dmitrij Peszkov Kreml-szóvivő is elismeri, hogy az ukrán mélységi dróncsapások komoly fejtörést okoznak az orosz üzemanyagellátásnak. A pilóta nélküli fegyvereknek hála az orosz területszerzés 2023 óta először negatívba fordult. A drónháború elmérgesedésével egyre gyakrabban bukkannak fel orosz és ukrán drónok NATO-tagállamok területén: Romániában egy ukrán tengeri drón okozott botrányt, a baltikumban repülő eszközök borzolják a kedélyeket. Cikkünk folyamatosan frissül az orosz-ukrán háború legfontosabb híreivel.

properties.title: Kiderült, mikor megy tőzsdére a Perplexity
properties.summary: A Perplexity vezérigazgatója, Aravind Srinivas a CNBC-nek adott interjújában megerősítette, hogy a mesterséges intelligenciával működő keresőmotor-fejlesztő vállalat 2028-ban tervezi a tőzsdére lépést, függetlenül attól, hogyan fogadja majd a piac az Anthropic és az OpenAI nyilvános részvénykibocsátását - jelentette a Cnbc.

properties.title: Anunțul medicilor despre șoferul care a pierdut controlul TIR-ului pe care îl conducea în Constanța
properties.summary: Șoferul de TIR care a accidentat 10 mașini în Constanța, după ce a pierdut controlul camionului, a fost externat din spital în această dimineață. Când a ajuns la Urgențe, era conștient și în stare stabilă, după ce primise primul ajutor la locul incidentului.

properties.title: Etapa hormonală care începe înainte de ultima menstruație
properties.summary: Schimbările hormonale nu apar brusc, ci se instalează treptat, uneori cu ani înainte de oprirea definitivă a menstruației. De aceea, multe femei au simptome variate înainte să înțeleagă exact în ce etapă se află.

properties.title: „Cred că rușii au pierdut Moldova”. Opinia lui Zelenski despre influența politică a Rusiei asupra altor țări
properties.summary: Influența politică a Rusiei asupra altor țări este în scădere, crede președintele ucrainean Volodimir Zelenski. În susținerea acestei afirmații, el oferă câteva exemple, menționând Republica Moldova. Declarația face parte dintr-un amplu interviu acordat The Guardian, din care a publicat fragmente în pagina sa de pe platforma X.

properties.title: Șeful Poliției Locale Constanța justifică intervenția brutală asupra șoferului TIR-ului care a scăpat de sub control la Constanța
properties.summary: Şoferul de TIR care a lovit 10 mașini, inclusiv un autobuz cu pasageri, în Constanța a fost lovit de un agent de la Poliția Locală, care a folosit și spray lacrimogen, după ce camionul s-a oprit într-un copac. Ionuț Dumitru, șeful Poliției Locale din Constanța, a spus la Digi24 că șoferul nu a cooperat cu polițiștii și a avut reacții violente, iar din acest motiv a fost folosită forța împotriva lui.

properties.title: Titi Aur, despre TIR-ul scăpat de sub control din Constanța: A fost aproape intenționat. Este pericol public maxim
properties.summary: Titi Aur, expert în conducere defensivă, a declarat marți, la Digi24, că TIR-ul scăpat de sub control în Constanța reprezintă un „pericol public maxim”. El a susținut că nu a fost „un accident”, ci un incident „aproape intenționat”, care ar trebui sancționat drastic.

properties.title: Un polițist local i-a dat cu spray lacrimogen și l-a lovit cu picioarele pe șoferul TIR-ului scăpat de sub control în Constanța
properties.summary: Şoferul de TIR care a provocat accidentul rutier din Constanța, de luni seară, când a lovit 10 mașini, inclusiv un autobuz cu pasageri, a fost bătut de agenții de la Poliția Locală, care au intervenit pentru a-l da jos de la volan, după ce camionul s-a oprit într-un copac. În imaginile publicate de presa locală se vede cum un agent cățărat pe ușa din stânga cabinei folosește un spray lacrimogen și îl lovește pe șofer cu piciorul, la îndemnul colegilor săi. Focus Press, un site de știri locale, scrie că șoferul ar fi fost la un pas de comă hipoglicemică și i s-ar fi făcut rău la volan, medicii care l-au consultat ulterior depistându-i o glicemie extrem de mică.

properties.title: Polemică după ce șoferul de TIR a fost bătut la locul accidentului din Constanța
properties.summary: Șoferului de TIR care a acroșat mai multe mașini și un autobuz, în Constanța, i s-a făcut rău la volan, potrivit informațiilor din presa locală. Bărbatul a intrat în șoc hipoglicemic, iar polițiștii locali au intervenit brutal pentru a-l scoate din cabina camionului. În incidentul care a avut loc luni după-amiază au fost implicate în …

properties.title: Lewis Hamilton, impresionat de noul fenomen din Formula 1: „Îmi amintește de mine în 2007”
properties.summary:
Lewis Hamilton a urcat pe locul al doilea în ierarhia piloților din Formula 1 după locul doi ocupat în Principat. Multiplul campion mondial laudă forma pe care o arată Kimi Antonelli, dar în același timp spune că parcursul italianului îl motivează suplimentar. Avertismentul lui Max Verstappen pentru RedBull după etapa de la Monaco Anul 2026 […]

© G4Media.ro.

properties.title: Trump: Negocierile pentru un acord al SUA cu Iran se află în „etapa finală”
properties.summary: Preşedintele american Donald Trump a declarat marţi că negociatorii se află la "finalul" discuţiilor pentru un acord de pace în Orientul Mijlociu, după ce Iranul şi Israelul au oprit ostilităţile care ameninţau să reaprindă războiul care durează de luni de zile, informează AFP.

properties.title: Iveta Radičová: O populizme a prečo naše vlády padajú (Bárdy & Káčer)
properties.summary: Prečo nedokážu demokratické sily na Slovensku stabilne vládnuť a prečo sa namiesto toho neustále vracia k moci Robert Fico?

properties.title: Ukrajinské údery do ruského týlu neberou konce
properties.summary: U ruského města Bělgorod v pondělí explodoval muniční sklad. Nad městem se šíří černý kouř. Místní úřady hlásí pět zraněných kvůli rázové vlně po výbuchu. K výbuchu došlo zřejmě po dalším úderu ukrajinských dronů, které se neustále stupňují. Ukrajinci úspěšně zasahují ruská letiště, vojenské základny i ropnou infrastrukturu a rafinérie.

properties.title: Katastrofa odrzutowca w czasie awaryjnego lądowania w Dominikanie
properties.summary: Prywatny odrzutowiec eksplodował w czasie awaryjnego lądowania na lotnisku La Romana w Dominikanie. Zginęły dwie osoby. Dramatyczne chwile tuż przed oraz moment katastrofy zarejestrował pracownik lotniska.

properties.title: Sprawa Orderu Orła Białego. Grzegorz Motyka: Wołodymyr Zełenski postanowił "zburzyć Bastylię"
properties.summary: Jak zaczął się dialog historyków i zaczęły się ekshumacje, to nagle prezydent Wołodymyr Zełenski postanowił "zburzyć Bastylię" - ocenił w "Rozmowie Piaseckiego" w TVN24 profesor Grzegorz Motyka, członek Kolegium Instytutu Pamięci Narodowej. Komentował tak ostatnie wydarzenia po tym, jak prezydent Ukrainy nadał imię "Bohaterów UPA" jednej z jednostek wojskowych.

properties.title: Užsieniečių teisinės padėties įstatymo reforma 2026 m.: daugiau lankstumo darbuotojams ir didesni reikalavimai darbdaviams
properties.summary: 2026 m. gegužės 14 buvo priimti reikšmingi Lietuvos Respublikos įstatymo „Dėl užsieniečių teisinės padėties“ (UTPĮ) pakeitimai, kurie įsigaliojo etapais – pagrindinė dalis nuostatų taikoma nuo 2026 m. gegužės 22 d., o dalis nuostatų įsigalios nuo 2026 m. lapkričio 1 d.

properties.title: Iran, Israel exchange strikes; ceasefire on a brink of collapse
properties.summary:
Iran and Israel exchanged strikes between the evening of the 7th of June and the morning of the 8th of June, effectively breaking a ceasefire that had been in place since April, writes Politico. According to the Israeli military, ten ballistic missiles launched from Iran were intercepted, and there were no reports of casualties. The […]

The post Iran, Israel exchange strikes; ceasefire on a brink of collapse appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Riga Airport faces serious challenges as passenger growth plans come under pressure
properties.summary:
Riga Airport expects to serve between 7.1 and 7.2 million passengers this year, but a range of geopolitical and economic factors could threaten those ambitions, according to Airport CEO Laila Odiņa. Speaking on TV3’s 900 sekundes programme on Friday, Odiņa said that the continued closure of the Russian, Ukrainian and Belarusian markets remains one of […]

The post Riga Airport faces serious challenges as passenger growth plans come under pressure appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Latvian immunologist Ņikiforenko sentenced to 13 years in prison for sexual abuse of patients
properties.summary:
The Riga District Court in Jūrmala on Wednesday sentenced immunologist Jevgēnijs Ņikiforenko to 13 years in prison and banned him from practicing medicine for seven years after finding him guilty of sexually abusing patients, according to information obtained by the LETA news agency. During closing arguments, the prosecutor had requested a sentence of 14 years’ […]

The post Latvian immunologist Ņikiforenko sentenced to 13 years in prison for sexual abuse of patients appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: President: Ukraine’s accession to the EU is in the security interests of Latvia and Europe
properties.summary:
Ukraine’s accession to the European Union (EU) would be in the security interests of both Latvia and Europe as a whole, Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs emphasized during a meeting with Ukrainian Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko at Riga Castle on Tuesday. According to presidential adviser Mārtiņš Drēģeris, the two sides discussed bilateral relations between Latvia and […]

The post President: Ukraine’s accession to the EU is in the security interests of Latvia and Europe appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy visits Estonia for NB8 summit
properties.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy will be in Tallinn on Tuesday to attend the Nordic-Baltic cooperation summit and meet with President Alar Karis.

properties.title: Expansion of state high schools in Tallinn hinges on budget decisions
properties.summary: City of Tallinn and Estonia's Ministry of Education are exploring a major overhaul of the capital's school network, including a possible expansion of state-run high schools, but any final decisions will depend on available funding in the national budget.

properties.title: Passenger numbers for Tartu-Helsinki flights show steady growth
properties.summary: Passenger numbers on Finnair flights between Tartu and Helsinki have increased significantly this year due to improved stability, prompting preparations for a new public procurement process to secure the route's future.

properties.title: Estonian chess player Mai Narva qualifies for 2027 Women's World Cup
properties.summary: Estonian chess player Mai Narva has qualified for the Women's World Cup after finishing 10th at the European Women's European Championship (EWCC) in Batumi, Georgia.

properties.title: Tallinn planning separate bike paths along Tehnika tänav
properties.summary: Tallinn is planning to build separate and safe bicycle paths along the entire length of Tehnika tänav and to fully reconstruct the Endla tänav and Paldiski maantee intersections.

properties.title: 'Biting is not allowed', Estonia's police chief warns after attacks on officers
properties.summary: Estonia's police chief has said "teeth flash often" during recent attacks on police, following a high-profile incident involving a judge who allegedly bit an officer after being asked to leave a nightclub in Tallinn.

properties.title: Vex the paragliding shepherd dog shares limelight with NATO jets at Tartu air show
properties.summary: A paragliding dog threatened to upstage the best of NATO fast jet pilots at a Tartu County airshow over the weekend.

properties.title: Gallery: Baltic Pride parade brings even more color to Tallinn Old Town
properties.summary: Crowds, flags and banners filled the streets of Tallinn for the Baltic Pride march on Saturday, capping off a weeklong celebration of LGBT+ visibility, community and support.

properties.title: Gallery: Narva half marathon canceled after suspicious bag found along route
properties.summary: Saturday's half marathon in Narva was called off minutes before its scheduled start after emergency services received a report of a suspicious bag along the route.

properties.title: Tartustki vene kirjandusklassikat varastanud seitse grusiini astuvad Pariisis kohtu ette
properties.summary: Pariisis algas teisipäeval kohtuprotsess seitsme Gruusia kodaniku üle, keda süüdistatakse haruldaste vene kirjandusklassika esmatrükkide varastamises. Uurijate hinnangul olid nad seotud üle Euroopa tegutsenud võrgustikuga, mille tegevus ulatus ka Tartu Ülikooli raamatukokku.

properties.title: Ulvi Kõrgemaa: ligi 90 protsenti tervishoiukõrgkooli lõpetajatest jääb tööle Eestisse
properties.summary: Kuku Raadio saates «Sihik» käis külas Tallinna Tervishoiu Kõrgkooli õppeprorektor ja rektorikandidaat Ulvi Kõrgemaa, kes rääkis tervishoiuhariduse olukorrast Eestis, kõrgkooli tulevikust ning tervishoiutöötajate järelkasvu tagamisest.

properties.title: Iraan lükkas tagasi süüdistused Albaania protestide õhutamises
properties.summary: Iraan eitas esmaspäeval Albaania peaministri Edi Rama väiteid, nagu oleks Teheran seotud Donald Trumpi väimehe Jared Kushneriga seotud luksuskuurordi vastu puhkenud protestide ümber leviva desinformatsiooniga.

properties.title: Tallinna lähiümbruse kinnisvara uurinud ajakirjanik nimetas järgmised perspektiivikad piirkonnad
properties.summary: Harjumaal Tallinna lähiümbruse kuumemad arendused välja toonud Äripäeva ajakirjanik Kristjan Kurg nentis, et järgmistel aastatel on potentsiaali kiireks arenguks näiteks pealinnast lõunasse jääval Luigel, aga ka ida pool olevatel asulatel.

properties.title: Indrek Lepik: Zelenskõi visiit Tallinna on märgiline
properties.summary: Ukraina presidendi Volodõmõr Zelenskõi liitumine Põhjala ja Balti riikide koostöö tippkohtumisega Tallinnas on loogiline, kuna Läänemere-äärsed riigid on Ukraina suuremad toetajad sõjas Venemaa vastu, ent samal ajal tuleb näiteks Eestile kasuks Ukraina sõjakogemuse jagamine, ütles Äripäeva välisteemade toimetaja Indrek Lepik.

properties.title: Suur kinnisvarakaart: Tallinna kuldse ringi kombitsad sirutuvad aina kaugemale
properties.summary: Pealinna lähivaldade asulatesse kerkib üha uusi elamuid, kuid Tallinnast kaugemale kolimine ei tähenda enam, et uue kodu saab kätte tingimata odavamalt.
